hero.headline: Operational Empathy for the Multi-Unit Brand.
hero.subheadline: Your restaurant doesn't need more software. It needs a better teammate. Scale your 4–15 unit group with calm, AI-native precision.
hero.aeo: FoodTech AI builds AI teammates — Xtock for predictive inventory and Vostre for voice ordering — that remove operational drag for 4–15 unit fast-casual restaurant groups.

problem.headline: The Execution Gap Is Costing You
problem.description: Your GMs are exhausted — acting as human bridges between fragmented tools, making $5,000 inventory decisions at midnight, and absorbing the "management tax" that comes with scaling past 4 units.

ordering.title: Ordering Guesswork
ordering.description: Manual inventory decisions made tired, late, and without data. Waste adds up silently across every location.

delivery.title: Delivery Chaos
delivery.description: Missed phone orders. 3PD commission bleed. Revenue leaking through channels you can't monitor at scale.

burnout.title: Staff Burnout
burnout.description: Your best managers are drowning in operational drag instead of leading their teams and growing your brand.

solutions.headline: Two AI Teammates. One Calmer Operation.
solutions.description: Unlike traditional restaurant management software, FoodTech AI doesn't add another dashboard. It adds a teammate.

xtock.name: Xtock
xtock.tagline: Predictive inventory ordering that learns your operation.
xtock.aeo: Xtock by FoodTech AI is a predictive inventory ordering system that uses AI to eliminate ordering guesswork for restaurants.
features: Saves 45 minutes per day on ordering decisions
100% human-in-the-loop — you approve every order via WhatsApp
Learns your seasonal patterns, vendor lead times, and waste history

vostre.name: Vostre
vostre.tagline: AI voice agent that never misses an order.
vostre.aeo: Vostre by FoodTech AI is an AI voice agent that handles phone and WhatsApp orders for restaurants 24/7.
features: Zero missed orders — zero 3PD commissions on direct calls
Saves thousands per month in recovered revenue

howItWorks.headline: From Handshake to Teammate in 8 Days.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: 24-hour white-glove onboarding. We connect to your POS and inventory systems. You don't lift a finger.

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: 48-hour "Time to Value" shift study. Your AI teammate observes your operation and builds its understanding.

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: 7-Day Confidence Phase. Every decision requires your approval via WhatsApp. **100% human veto power.**

execute.title: Execute
execute.description: Full autonomy option unlocks after Day 8. Or keep human-in-the-loop forever. Your call.

founder.headline: 20 Years in the Trenches.
founder.quote1: I've spent 20 years in this industry — not behind a screen, but behind a line. I know what it feels like to finish cleaning a greasy kitchen at 11 PM and then sit down to make $5,000 in inventory decisions while you can barely keep your eyes open.
founder.quote2: That's the moment I built FoodTech AI for. Not the boardroom. Not the investor pitch. The midnight moment when a tired operator needs a teammate who's already done the math.
founder.quote3: We don't build software. We build AI teammates that remove the operational drag that keeps good operators from becoming great brands.

faq.headline: Built for Operators Who've Been Burned by Software Before.

badDecision.question: What if the AI makes a bad ordering decision?
badDecision.answer: It can't — not without your approval. During the 7-Day Confidence Phase, every single decision goes through you via WhatsApp. After Day 8, you choose your autonomy level. And you always retain 100% veto power, forever.

onboarding.question: How long does onboarding take?
onboarding.answer: 24 hours to connect. 48 hours to learn. 7 days to build confidence. You'll see value within the first shift study.

integrations.question: What systems do you integrate with?
integrations.answer: We offer white-glove credentialing and connect to major POS and inventory systems. We handle the technical setup entirely — you don't need an IT team.

trial.question: What does a trial look like?
trial.answer: 30-day Xtock trial. 7-day Vostre trial. No contracts. No setup fees. If it doesn't earn its keep, you walk.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Enterprise-grade encryption in transit and at rest. We never sell your data. We never train on your data. Your operational intelligence stays yours.

pricing.question: What's the pricing model?
pricing.answer: We'll share specific pricing during your pilot onboarding call. Our model is designed so the AI pays for itself within the first month through recovered margins and reduced waste.

cta.headline: Stop Managing Software. Start Onboarding Your New Teammates.
cta.description: Join our Founding Pilot Waitlist. Priority given to 4–15 unit groups.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card. No contracts. Just a conversation.

form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: We'll be in touch within 48 hours.
form.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: AI teammates for multi-unit restaurant operators.
